user.title: 3D Floor Plan
user.description: Add the 3D Floor Plan panel to your Home Assistant sidebar.

abort.already_configured: 3D Floor Plan is already set up.

init.title: Standalone kiosk server
init.description: Serve a self-contained live 3D page on its own port for wall tablets / kiosks. The page only shows the 3D view (no access to Home Assistant settings). Leave the port at 0 to disable. Set a long-lived access token to enable live state + control — create it in your Home Assistant profile using the SAME account you edit the plan with. Then open http://<home-assistant-host>:<port>/ on the kiosk. SECURITY: this port serves the token to anyone who can reach it, over plain HTTP — keep it on a trusted LAN and never forward it to the internet. Revoke the token in HA to shut off access.
